description: Enhance Kami Phase Start popup with kami icons flanking the title (torii gate diamond style from PoliticsTrack), bold 'izquierda a derecha'/'left to right' text, and more color/decoration. Also add '--- End Kami Turn ---' log entry when all shrines are resolved in advanceKamiResolution().
steps: In src/i18n/en.ts: Split kami.phaseStart.description into parts to allow bold rendering. Change value to use a marker for the bold part: 'Shrines will now be resolved from **left to right**. The player with the most Shinto force in each shrine wins the Kami reward.' -- Or better: keep the string as-is and handle bold rendering in the component by splitting on the key phrase.
In src/i18n/es.ts: Same approach - the description already contains 'izquierda a derecha' which will be bolded in the component.

In src/components/GameBoard.tsx around line 510 (the kamiPhasePopupVisible block): Add torii gate kami icons flanking the h3 title. Use inline SVG matching the PoliticsTrack renderKamiIcon pattern (diamond-shaped container with torii SVG, gold color). Wrap the title in a flex container with icons on both sides. For the description paragraph, split the text on 'left to right' (en) or 'izquierda a derecha' (es) and wrap that part in <strong> tags. Add decorative styling: subtle purple gradient background, glow effect on the border, maybe a subtle background pattern.

In src/utils/gameLogic.ts in the advanceKamiResolution() function: When nextIndex >= state.kamiResolutionTemples.length (all temples resolved), add '--- End Kami Turn ---' to the log array of the newState, right after setting kamiResolutionActive to false.
acceptance_criteria: Kami Phase popup has torii gate icons on both sides of the title
The phrase 'left to right' / 'izquierda a derecha' is rendered in bold in the popup description
The popup has enhanced visual styling (purple theme with decoration)
Game log shows '--- End Kami Turn ---' after all shrines are resolved
